steps.title: Registration
steps.description: Ensure you are registered to vote before the deadline.

steps.title: Research Candidates
steps.description: Learn about the candidates and their platforms.

steps.title: Find Polling Station
steps.description: Locate your assigned polling station and check its hours.

steps.title: Election Day
steps.description: Bring valid ID and cast your vote.

faqs.question: How do I register to vote?
faqs.answer: You can register online, by mail, or in person at your local election office.

faqs.question: What ID do I need to bring?
faqs.answer: Requirements vary by state, but commonly accepted forms include a driver's license, passport, or state ID.

faqs.question: Can I vote by mail?
faqs.answer: Yes, most states offer absentee or mail-in voting. You must request a ballot in advance.
